data.name: Main.SidebarHint
data.value: Each slot remembers a different app and its settings.

data.name: Main.DexPreparing
data.value: Preparing the virtual display and Scrcpy.

data.name: Main.SinglePreparing
data.value: Preparing a Scrcpy virtual display and the selected app.

data.name: Main.SingleCleaning
data.value: Cleaning up the Scrcpy virtual display.

data.name: Main.SingleRunningDetail
data.value: The Scrcpy virtual display is running.

data.name: Main.AuthorizationDetail
data.value: Approve ADB debugging on the phone.

data.name: Main.DeviceOfflineDetail
data.value: Check the phone connection or ADB status.

data.name: Main.PressStart
data.value: Press Start to launch the selected app on a new display.

data.name: Main.ApplyRestartDetail
data.value: Removing the current display and restarting with the new settings.

data.name: Main.ApplyNoDevice
data.value: Settings were saved. They will be used the next time DeX starts because no phone is connected.

data.name: Main.ApplyDeferred
data.value: Settings were saved but could not be applied now. They will be used the next time DeX starts.

data.name: Main.ApplySucceeded
data.value: Settings were saved and the virtual display was restarted.

data.name: Main.ApplyFailed
data.value: Settings were saved but could not be applied now.{0}They will be used the next time DeX starts.{0}{0}{1}

data.name: Main.SingleSavedNoDevice
data.value: Window {0} settings were saved.{1}They will be used next time because no phone is connected.

data.name: Main.SingleRestartDetail
data.value: Closing the current window and restarting with the new settings.

data.name: Main.SingleApplied
data.value: Window {0} was restarted with the new settings.

data.name: Main.LoadAppsFailed
data.value: Could not load the app list.{0}{0}{1}

data.name: Main.TrayContinues
data.value: DX Manager continues running in the system tray.

data.name: Main.CaptureHotkeyFailed
data.value: Could not register the F8 capture hotkey.

data.name: Main.KeyMappingFailed
data.value: Could not start Scrcpy key mapping.

data.name: Error.StopDex
data.value: An error occurred while stopping DeX.

data.name: Error.ApplySingleSettings
data.value: Could not apply window launch settings.

data.name: Capture.Hint
data.value: Press F8 again: capture the Scrcpy window Drag the mouse: capture a region ESC: cancel

data.name: Settings.SavedInline
data.value: Settings saved. Restart to apply language or path changes.

data.name: Settings.Description
data.value: Change display and Scrcpy launch options in the main window. Manage connections, paths and advanced behavior here.

data.name: Settings.AboutSummary
data.value: An independently developed utility for managing Android device displays and input.

data.name: Settings.AboutScrcpy
data.value: This program includes and uses scrcpy 4.0, open-source software distributed by Genymobile and Romain Vimont under the Apache License 2.0.

data.name: Settings.AboutSamsung
data.value: This program works with Samsung DeX features on compatible Samsung devices, but is not produced, sponsored, endorsed, or distributed by Samsung Electronics. Samsung and Samsung DeX are trademarks of their respective owner.

data.name: Licenses.Guide
data.value: Review notices and license terms for open-source software included with DX Manager.

data.name: Licenses.FileMissing
data.value: The bundled license file could not be found: {0}

data.name: Licenses.ReadFailed
data.value: Could not read the license file: {0} ({1})

data.name: Log.Program.ScrcpyAdbPath
data.value: Configured the ADB path for scrcpy: {0}

data.name: Log.Settings.SchemaUpdated
data.value: Updated the settings schema from {0} to {1}.

data.name: Log.Settings.LoadFailed
data.value: Could not read the settings file. Default settings will be used. Backup: {0}

data.name: Error.Process.FileNotFound
data.value: The executable could not be found.

data.name: Log.Process.KillTimedOutFailed
data.value: Could not terminate the timed-out process: {0}

data.name: Error.Adb.ShellCommandEmpty
data.value: The ADB shell command is empty.

data.name: Error.Adb.PushFileNotFound
data.value: The file to transfer could not be found.

data.name: Error.Adb.RemotePathEmpty
data.value: The destination path on the phone is empty.

data.name: Error.Adb.WirelessEndpointEmpty
data.value: The wireless ADB address is empty.

data.name: Log.Adb.TargetCleared
data.value: Cleared the selected ADB target device.

data.name: Log.Adb.WakeUpScrcpyUnavailable
data.value: ADB wake-up failed: scrcpy wake-up is not configured.

data.name: Log.Adb.WakeUpFallback
data.value: Default ADB wake-up failed. Starting scrcpy wake-up.

data.name: Log.Adb.WakeUpDeviceFound
data.value: Detected the ADB device after scrcpy wake-up.

data.name: Log.Adb.WakeUpDeviceMissing
data.value: Could not detect an ADB device after scrcpy wake-up.

data.name: Log.Main.CaptureHotkeyRegistrationFailed
data.value: Could not register the capture hotkey.

data.name: Log.Main.ScreenOffReapplyFailed
data.value: Could not reapply screen-off to the phone.

data.name: Log.Main.StayAwakeCommandFailed
data.value: Could not change the stay-awake setting: {0}

data.name: Log.Main.StayAwakeEnabled
data.value: Enabled stay-awake for the active scrcpy sessions.

data.name: Log.Main.StayAwakeDisabled
data.value: Disabled stay-awake because no scrcpy session is running.

data.name: Log.Main.StayAwakeChangeFailed
data.value: Could not change the stay-awake setting.

data.name: Log.Main.PhoneScreenWoken
data.value: Turned on the phone screen after all scrcpy windows closed.

data.name: Log.Main.PhoneScreenWakeCommandFailed
data.value: The command to turn on the phone screen failed: {0}

data.name: Log.Main.PhoneScreenWakeFailed
data.value: Could not turn on the phone screen.

data.name: Log.Main.SettingsDeferredNoDevice
data.value: Saved the run settings. No ADB device is connected, so they will be applied the next time DeX starts.

data.name: Log.Main.SettingsImmediateApplyFailed
data.value: The run settings were saved but could not be applied immediately.

data.name: Main.ApplyFailedShort
data.value: Could not apply run settings immediately: {0}

data.name: Log.Main.AppListDisplayed
data.value: Displayed the scrcpy app list on the main screen.

data.name: Log.Main.AppListLoadFailed
data.value: Could not load the scrcpy app list.

data.name: Log.Main.DexSettingsSaved
data.value: Saved the DeX/scrcpy run settings from the main screen.

data.name: Log.Main.SingleWindowSettingsSaved
data.value: Saved the run settings for Single Window {0}.

data.name: Log.Main.ModeSwitchSaveFailed
data.value: Could not save the current run settings while switching modes: {0}

data.name: Log.AutoHide.ScrcpyMinimized
data.value: Minimized the running scrcpy windows because there was no user input.

data.name: Log.AutoHide.ManagerHidden
data.value: Hiding the DX Manager UI to the system tray because there was no user input.

data.name: Error.AutoStart.RegistryUnavailable
data.value: Could not open the startup registry key.

data.name: Log.AutoStart.Registered
data.value: Registered DX Manager for Windows startup.

data.name: Log.AutoStart.Unregistered
data.value: Removed DX Manager from Windows startup.

data.name: Log.Capture.Waiting
data.value: Capture pending: press F8 again or drag the mouse.

data.name: Log.Capture.ScrcpyWindowMissing
data.value: Capture mode could not start because no scrcpy window was found.

data.name: Error.Capture.ScrcpyWindowNotFound
data.value: The scrcpy window could not be found.

data.name: Error.Capture.WindowAreaUnavailable
data.value: Could not determine the scrcpy client area.

data.name: Error.Capture.DeviceFolderFailed
data.value: Could not prepare the capture folder on the phone. {0}

data.name: Error.Capture.PushFailed
data.value: Could not transfer the capture to the phone. {0}

data.name: Log.Capture.Pushed
data.value: Transferred the capture to the phone: {0}

data.name: Log.DeviceMonitor.Failed
data.value: An error occurred while monitoring the device.

data.name: Log.Dex.OperationInProgress
data.value: A DeX operation is already in progress.

data.name: Error.Dex.NoAuthorizedDevice
data.value: No authorized ADB device is connected.

data.name: Log.Dex.ApplyInProgress
data.value: A run-settings apply operation is already in progress.

data.name: Log.Dex.ApplyDeferredNoDevice
data.value: The run settings were saved but were not applied immediately because no authorized ADB device is connected.

data.name: Log.Dex.RemovingDisplayForApply
data.value: Removing the existing virtual display to apply the new run settings.

data.name: Error.Dex.DisplayResetFailed
data.value: Could not remove the existing virtual display.

data.name: Log.Dex.ApplyCompleted
data.value: Applied the new run settings immediately.

data.name: Log.Dex.ApplyFailed
data.value: Could not apply the new run settings immediately.

data.name: Log.Dex.ShutdownInProgress
data.value: Shutdown cleanup is already in progress.

data.name: Log.Dex.ShutdownCleanupCompleted
data.value: Completed ADB cleanup before program exit.

data.name: Log.Dex.ShutdownCleanupFailed
data.value: ADB cleanup before program exit failed.

data.name: Log.Hotkey.LowLevelEnabled
data.value: Using low-level keyboard hook hotkeys: capture={0}, exit={1}

data.name: Log.Hotkey.DiagnosticRegistrationRemoved
data.value: Removed the diagnostic RegisterHotKey registration to use the low-level hook.

data.name: Error.Hotkey.GlobalCaptureRegistrationFailed
data.value: Could not register the global capture hotkey: {0}

data.name: Error.Hotkey.LowLevelHookFailed
data.value: Could not install the low-level keyboard hook.

data.name: Log.Hotkey.Diagnostics
data.value: Key diagnostics: msg=0x{0}, vk=0x{1}, scan=0x{2}, flags=0x{3}, mods={4}

data.name: Error.KeyMapping.HookFailed
data.value: Could not install the key-mapping hook.

data.name: Log.KeyMapping.EnterConversionEnabled
data.value: Enter conversion enabled: initial mode=normal Enter; press Scroll Lock to switch to Shift+Enter mode.

data.name: Log.KeyMapping.EnterConversionDisabled
data.value: Enter conversion is disabled, so normal Enter will be sent unchanged.

data.name: Log.KeyMapping.Diagnostics
data.value: Key-mapping diagnostics: msg=0x{0}, vk=0x{1}, scan=0x{2}, flags=0x{3}, injected={4}

data.name: Log.KeyMapping.RightShiftNormalized
data.value: Normalizing the right Shift scan code for scrcpy input.

data.name: Path.Description.ExternalScrcpyAdb
data.value: ADB from the specified scrcpy folder

data.name: Log.Path.AdminRequired
data.value: Administrator privileges are required to register the ADB folder in the system PATH.

data.name: Error.Path.SystemEnvironmentUnavailable
data.value: Could not open the system environment variables.

data.name: Log.Path.SystemPathRegistered
data.value: Registered the ADB folder in the system PATH: {0}

data.name: Error.Path.ModernAdbNotFound
data.value: No runnable modern adb.exe was found. Check the bundled ADB or the specified scrcpy path.

data.name: Error.Path.AdbUnavailable
data.value: {0}: adb.exe could not be executed. Check the path.

data.name: Log.ScreenOff.Cancelled
data.value: Cancelled screen-off reapplication because its conditions no longer apply.

data.name: Log.ScreenOff.Starting
data.value: Starting the screen-off helper scrcpy sequentially.

data.name: Log.ScreenOff.Confirmed
data.value: Confirmed that screen-off was reapplied to the phone.

data.name: Log.ScreenOff.ConfirmationFailed
data.value: Could not confirm that screen-off was reapplied to the phone.

data.name: Error.Scrcpy.AppListLoadFailed
data.value: Could not load the scrcpy app list: {0}

data.name: Error.Scrcpy.AppListParseFailed
data.value: Could not parse the scrcpy app-list output.

data.name: Log.Scrcpy.AppListLoaded
data.value: Loaded the scrcpy app list: {0} app(s)

data.name: Log.Scrcpy.AlreadyRunning
data.value: Skipped duplicate launch because scrcpy is already running.

data.name: Log.Scrcpy.WakeUpFileMissing
data.value: The scrcpy wake-up executable is missing: {0}

data.name: Error.Scrcpy.ExitedBeforeWindow
data.value: scrcpy exited before its window was ready.

data.name: Error.Scrcpy.WindowTimeout
data.value: Timed out while waiting for the scrcpy window.

data.name: Error.SingleWindow.AppRequired
data.value: Select an app to run in the single window.

data.name: Log.SingleWindow.ProcessExited
data.value: The scrcpy process for Single Window {0} exited.

data.name: Error.SingleWindow.ExitedBeforeWindow
data.value: Single Window {0} scrcpy exited before its window was ready.

data.name: Log.SingleWindow.WindowReady
data.value: Single Window {0} scrcpy window ready: PID={1}

data.name: Error.SingleWindow.WindowTimeout
data.value: Timed out while waiting for the scrcpy window for Single Window {0}.

data.name: Log.Display.ReusingSetting
data.value: Reusing the existing virtual display setting: {0}

data.name: Error.Display.ApplyFailed
data.value: Could not apply the virtual display setting: {0}

data.name: Log.Display.SingleFallbackSelected
data.value: No existing virtual display matched the resolution/DPI, but only one candidate exists, so it was selected: {0}

data.name: Error.Display.ReusableNotFound
data.value: No reusable existing virtual display was found. Displays: {0}

data.name: Error.Display.ReusableAmbiguous
data.value: Multiple reusable virtual displays were found, so none could be selected. Candidates: {0}

data.name: Error.Display.NewAmbiguous
data.value: Could not unambiguously select the new virtual display ID. before=[{0}], after=[{1}], candidates=[{2}]

data.name: Log.Wireless.EnableFromUsb
data.value: Switching the USB device to wireless ADB mode: {0}, port={1}

data.name: Log.Wireless.Disconnected
data.value: Disconnected wireless ADB and switched to USB mode.

data.name: Settings.LanguageRestart
data.value: Language changes are applied after restarting DX Manager.

data.name: Settings.ThemeRestart
data.value: Theme changes are applied immediately after saving.

data.name: Settings.ResetDefaultsGuide
data.value: Reset every option, including DeX, single-window, connection, and keyboard settings.

data.name: Settings.ResetDefaultsConfirm
data.value: Restore every setting to its default value? Saved custom settings will be removed, and active services will fully use the defaults after restart.

data.name: Settings.ResetDefaultsDone
data.value: All settings were restored to defaults. Restart DX Manager to fully apply them to active services.

data.name: Settings.DiagnosticsGuide
data.value: Open logs or check ADB, Scrcpy and device connectivity.

data.name: Settings.AutoStartDex
data.value: Start DeX when a device connects

data.name: Settings.PairGuide
data.value: For the first connection without a cable, enter the pairing port and 6-digit code. The connection port may be different.

data.name: Settings.HotkeyCaptureGuide
data.value: Select a field, then press the desired key or key combination. Delete/Backspace: clear, Esc: cancel

data.name: Settings.LowLevelHotkey
data.value: Use low-level keyboard hook for hotkeys

data.name: Settings.WirelessRequiresIp
data.value: Enter the phone IP address when using wireless mode.

data.name: Wireless.NoUsb
data.value: No authorized USB device was found.

data.name: Wireless.MultipleUsb
data.value: Multiple USB devices were found. Connect only one.

data.name: Wireless.NoWifiIp
data.value: Could not detect the phone Wi-Fi address. Enter it manually.

data.name: Wireless.TcpipFailed
data.value: Could not enable TCP/IP mode on the phone: {0}

data.name: Wireless.InvalidPairCode
data.value: The pairing code must be the 6-digit number shown on the phone.

data.name: Wireless.Paired
data.value: Paired successfully. Connect using the connection port shown on the phone's Wireless debugging screen.

data.name: Wireless.HostEmpty
data.value: Wireless ADB IP address is empty.

data.name: Wireless.HostInvalid
data.value: The wireless ADB address is invalid.

data.name: Environment.PathSystem
data.value: The ADB folder is registered in the system PATH.

data.name: Environment.PathProcess
data.value: ADB is only in the current process PATH. System registration is optional.

data.name: Environment.PathAbsolute
data.value: ADB is not in PATH, but DX Manager uses its absolute path.

data.name: Environment.AdminNo
data.value: Running with standard privileges. Administrator access is required to modify system PATH.

data.name: Environment.DeviceFolderSkipped
data.value: Connect and authorize a phone to run this check.

data.name: Environment.DeviceFolderFailed
data.value: Cannot write to the phone folder: {0}

data.name: Environment.DeviceUnauthorized
data.value: Approve the RSA prompt on the phone: {0}

data.name: Environment.DeviceOfflineMessage
data.value: The device is offline. Reconnect USB.

data.name: Environment.NoDevice
data.value: No device found. Check the USB cable, Developer options, USB debugging, RSA approval, file transfer mode and Samsung USB driver.

data.name: Settings.Saved
data.value: Settings were saved. Restart DX Manager to apply path or language changes.

data.name: Log.Saved
data.value: The current session log was saved.

data.name: Environment.Guide
data.value: Android security does not allow USB debugging or RSA approval to be enabled automatically.{0}Check the phone and USB driver based on the results below.

data.name: Program.AlreadyRunning
data.value: DX Manager is already running.{0}Check the system tray.
